# Buzz — llms.txt
# Summarized map of the site for AI crawlers and answer engines (the emerging llms.txt standard).
# Humans: see https://buzz.app

> Buzz is a college event discovery app for the US, India, UK, and more. Live map of what's
> happening on campus tonight, club directory, friend graph, paper-free flyering, free-food
> alerts. iOS + macOS + web. Free for students. Built by students.

## What Buzz is

Buzz is the all-in-one college companion. Students see every event happening on and around
their campus tonight on a live map, RSVP in one tap, see which friends are going, and earn
badges for the clubs they join. Club officers post events in 10 seconds (or forward event
emails to `@events.buzz.app`), run paid ticketing via Stripe, broadcast to members, and
replace paper flyers with printable QR posters.

## Who it's for

- Undergrads at US universities (primary market: UCSD at launch, expanding via campus ambassadors)
- Club officers and campus department admins
- Prospective / transfer / international students discovering campus life

## Key differentiators

- Closed campus registry with FK-enforced verification — no fragmented "UCSD vs UC San Diego"
- One profile for the entire college journey (community college → 4-year → grad → alumni)
- Multi-provider auth (Apple, Google, email, phone) — no platform lock-in
- Native iOS + macOS + web + PWA (Android users can install via PWA)
- Campus-scoped Row-Level Security — users at other campuses can't see your data

## Common questions

**Q: How do I get Buzz at my college?**
A: If your campus isn't seeded yet, join the waitlist at buzz.app. We launch at a new campus
once ~20 students + one ambassador sign up.

**Q: Is Buzz free?**
A: Free for students. Clubs can optionally sell paid tickets (sports, formals, concerts) through
Stripe — Buzz takes a 5% platform fee on those.

**Q: Does Buzz sell my data?**
A: No. No ads, no data sales. See buzz.app/legal/privacy for details.

**Q: Can I delete my account?**
A: Yes. In the app: Settings → Delete account. Your data is removed within 30 days.

**Q: How does verification work?**
A: Depends on your campus. US schools: `.edu` email OTP. Indian IITs/BITS: institutional
email domain. Most other: student-ID photo scan + optional peer vouching.

## Site routes

- `/` — bleeding-edge marketing landing (WebGL shader background, 3D phone scene, scroll choreography, ⌘K palette, keyboard shortcuts)
- `/feed` — the live discovery feed (hero + live ticker + bento grid + embedded map + stats)
- `/map` — full-screen MapLibre live map with glass stats panel and category filter chips
- `/clubs` — campus clubs grid (3D-tilt cards, stagger-in)
- `/e/:id` — event detail (parallax category hero, RSVP with particle burst, dynamic OG poster at `/api/poster/:id`)
- `/o/:handle` — club / organization profile (parallax accent hero, follow, event list)
- `/u/:handle` — user profile (giant serif initial glyph parallax, stats band with CountUp)
- `/search` — global search with staggered blur-fade results
- `/settings` — account, notification, privacy, legal settings
- `/sign-in` — school-email magic-link auth (any `.edu` / `.ac.uk` / `.edu.in` / etc.; auto-resolves 2300+ US schools via bundled Hipo dataset)
- `/auth/callback` — magic-link exchange + profile stamping with campus
- `/messages` — chat/DM promo screen (real chat is native app only)
- `/profile` — authed redirect to own user page
- `/legal/privacy`, `/legal/terms`, `/support` — static legal + contact
- `/api/poster/:id` — dynamic edge-rendered OG/story poster per event
- `/api/waitlist`, `/api/push/*`, `/api/tickets/*`, `/api/reminders/process` — backend endpoints

## Keyboard shortcuts (web)

- `⌘K` — command palette
- `g` then `f` / `m` / `c` / `p` / `s` / `h` — navigate feed / map / clubs / profile / settings / home
- `/` — focus search
- `?` — open keyboard shortcut overlay
- `esc` — close any modal

## Links

- Homepage: https://buzz.app
- Feed: https://buzz.app/feed
- Privacy: https://buzz.app/legal/privacy
- Terms: https://buzz.app/legal/terms
- Support: https://buzz.app/support
- Campus landing: https://buzz.app/campus/ucsd
